{{Quote|Wow, are you really a noble? You must be pretty rich, right? Is your family important?|Christya|<ref name="KotOR" />}}
'''Christya''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who met the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Republic soldier|soldier]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] in the [[Upper City Cantina]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] in [[3956 BBY]]. After being impressed by Revan's [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]] skills, Christya offered to buy him drinks. Revan accepted, but as Christya made her way to the bar, she met a [[Unidentified Tarisian noble|Tarisian noble]] and left the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] with him instead.

==Biography==
{{Quote|You know, you're my kind of guy; rich and handsome—just the way I like them. Why don't we slip away to the tap room together? If you play your cards right Pazaak might not be the only game you get lucky at tonight.|Christya|<ref name="KotOR" />}}
Christya was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who lived around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. She was present on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]<ref name="KotOR" /> when the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Destruction of Taris|invaded]] the planet in [[3956 BBY]].<ref name="CG">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

{{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic}}
During her time on Taris, Christya conversed with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Republic soldier|soldiers]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and [[Carth Onasi]] in the [[Upper City Cantina]], telling them about her interest in [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]]. Christya was impressed when Revan defeated [[Niklos]], a local pazaak champion, in a match, praising Revan's wealth and good looks. She suggested that they go to the bar and buy some drinks for twenty [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. Revan handed her the money eagerly, and Christya began to move to the bar, telling him not to take too long. However, on her way through the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]], Christya met a [[Unidentified Tarisian noble|Tarisian noble]], and ignoring her deal with Revan, she began flirting with him. Although Revan attempted to interrupt, she eventually left the cantina with the noble to go to his mansion, leaving Revan twenty credits short.<ref name="KotOR" />
{{Endgame}}

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|All that strategy. All those credits… It's enough to make a girl get all flushed!|Christya, on pazaak|<ref name="KotOR" />}}
Christya felt exhilarated when watching pazaak, praising the game's players, depth, and stakes. She enjoyed the company of rich and prominent men, such as [[Noble/Legends|nobles]], but found poorer men uninteresting. She was used to life's luxuries and expected men to provide her with nothing less. Christya also described herself as an impatient woman. She had [[Color/Legends|blonde]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]], brown [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and light skin.<ref name="KotOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|You must not be as good at Pazaak as I thought. Well, I'm not going to waste my time with some penniless gambler!|Christya, if the player refuses to give her twenty credits|<ref name="KotOR" />}}
Christya appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', in which the player, Revan, can interact with her. However, the nature of the interaction is such that it does not progress any plot, nor does it change the player's alignment. Therefore, it is undetermined whether Revan ever spoke with Christya, and, if so, what form the conversation took.

If Revan is female, there is no option to buy drinks with her. It is also possible to refuse to give her any credits, in which she will instantly become uninterested, and go into the bar anyway and meet the noble. The same dialogue will play out, only Revan will not have lost 20 credits.<ref name="KotOR" />
